title: Health score model hits 0.81 AUC, third straight quarter of lift
anchor: Model accuracy climbed from 0.67 two quarters ago to 0.74 last quarter to 0.81 currently.
connect: Override rate dropped to 11% from the 24% peak, showing CSMs trust the model more.
body: Model accuracy climbed from 0.67 two quarters ago to 0.74 last quarter to 0.81 currently. Override rate dropped to 11% from the 24% peak, showing CSMs trust the model more.
trace: Three consecutive quarters of AUC improvement with corresponding decline in CSM override behavior suggests model calibration is working.

title: Real-time product telemetry goes live, health model sees signals within minutes
anchor: The Mixpanel sync moved from 3-day batch delay to real-time on April 18.
connect: Usage spikes now feed the health score immediately instead of waiting 72 hours for the next batch.
body: The Mixpanel sync moved from 3-day batch delay to real-time on April 18. Usage spikes now feed the health score immediately instead of waiting 72 hours for the next batch.
trace: Infrastructure upgrade from batch to real-time fundamentally changes how quickly the health model can react to engagement patterns.

title: 312 playbooks completed end-to-end in 30 days, first time we can measure it
anchor: Completion attribution shipped April 18 in the CS platform update.
connect: Prior periods ran blind on whether playbooks actually finished once they triggered.
body: Completion attribution shipped April 18 in the CS platform update. Prior periods ran blind on whether playbooks actually finished once they triggered.
trace: New platform capability makes playbook outcome measurement possible for the first time, enabling governance of what actually gets done versus what gets started.

title: 47 accounts move from mid-touch to high-touch based on 14 months of usage data
anchor: Reclassification uses actual renewal and engagement patterns instead of initial onboarding tier assignment.
connect: New playbook routing starts Q3 with coverage tiers aligned to real account behavior.
body: Reclassification uses actual renewal and engagement patterns instead of initial onboarding tier assignment. New playbook routing starts Q3 with coverage tiers aligned to real account behavior.
trace: Segmentation refresh replaces onboarding-based assignments with 14 months of actual account behavior data.

title: BigQuery feature-usage pipeline approved for Q2, replaces login-frequency proxies
anchor: Pipeline approval came April 22, targeting the health score model's proxy signals.
connect: Model currently uses login frequency as a stand-in for actual feature engagement depth.
body: Pipeline approval came April 22, targeting the health score model's proxy signals. Model currently uses login frequency as a stand-in for actual feature engagement depth.
trace: Data quality investment moves the health model from proxy signals to direct feature-usage measurement.

title: Likelihood-to-renew model runs in shadow production alongside composite score
anchor: Probabilistic layer started April 21, producing its own renewal prediction history.
connect: Team can now compare the composite health score versus a dedicated renewal-probability model.
body: Probabilistic layer started April 21, producing its own renewal prediction history. Team can now compare the composite health score versus a dedicated renewal-probability model.
trace: Second model running in parallel to test whether a probabilistic approach outperforms the current composite scoring method.

title: Handoff data completeness jumps to 84% across 24 Q2 deals
anchor: Stakeholder maps, buying reasons, and verbal commitments now populate in 84% of closed-won handoffs.
connect: Q1 completeness sat at 41%, meaning Day-0 health scores had half the signal they needed.
body: Stakeholder maps, buying reasons, and verbal commitments now populate in 84% of closed-won handoffs. Q1 completeness sat at 41%, meaning Day-0 health scores had half the signal they needed.
trace: Sales-to-CS handoff quality improvement directly feeds health model accuracy at the start of the customer lifecycle.

title: Custom Permissions launch traces directly to Beacon Logistics early renewal
anchor: Feature went live March 8, health score stayed green 21 days, renewal conversation opened April 2.
connect: Contract signed April 14, completing the product-event-to-renewal attribution chain.
body: Feature went live March 8, health score stayed green 21 days, renewal conversation opened April 2. Contract signed April 14, completing the product-event-to-renewal attribution chain.
trace: End-to-end attribution story from product launch through sustained health score improvement to early renewal completion.

title: CS tool consolidation frees 40% of connector maintenance bandwidth
anchor: 3 tools retired in Q1 2026, reducing admin load on the integration layer.
connect: Freed bandwidth shifts to health model tuning and segmentation improvement work.
body: 3 tools retired in Q1 2026, reducing admin load on the integration layer. Freed bandwidth shifts to health model tuning and segmentation improvement work.
trace: Infrastructure simplification creates capacity for higher-value model improvement activities.

title: Salesforce-to-CS sync holds 99.7% uptime in March, above the 99% threshold
anchor: Nightly handoff freshness maintains signal reliability for the health model.
connect: Uptime consistency supports the Day-0 health score accuracy gains from improved handoff data.
body: Nightly handoff freshness maintains signal reliability for the health model. Uptime consistency supports the Day-0 health score accuracy gains from improved handoff data.
trace: Integration layer stability underpins both the health model's data freshness and the handoff completeness improvements.

title: Override rate trajectory shows 3-quarter decline from 24% peak to 11%
anchor: CSMs substitute their judgment for the model output in 11% of cases currently.
connect: Peak override rate of 24% suggests the model was producing signals CSMs didn't trust.
body: CSMs substitute their judgment for the model output in 11% of cases currently. Peak override rate of 24% suggests the model was producing signals CSMs didn't trust.
trace: Declining override rate correlates with AUC improvement, indicating CSMs are gaining confidence in model outputs.

title: Mid-market NRR holds at 117% for third consecutive quarter above benchmark
anchor: Q3 2025, Q4 2025, and Q1 2026 all cleared the 110% benchmark threshold.
connect: Consistency above benchmark validates the health model's renewal prediction accuracy in this segment.
body: Q3 2025, Q4 2025, and Q1 2026 all cleared the 110% benchmark threshold. Consistency above benchmark validates the health model's renewal prediction accuracy in this segment.
trace: Three-quarter streak above benchmark in the mid-market segment correlates with health model improvement timeline.

title: 2026 Annual CS Benchmark arrives April 30, first fresh industry data in a year
anchor: Current segmentation model runs on 2025 baseline data.
connect: Fresh ratio data enables coverage tier tuning versus updated industry standards.
body: Current segmentation model runs on 2025 baseline data. Fresh ratio data enables coverage tier tuning versus updated industry standards.
trace: Annual benchmark refresh provides external validation data for the segmentation model that underwent the 47-account reclassification.

title: Onboarding completion rate sits at 89% across Q1 cohort of 9 accounts
anchor: Activation milestones feed back as enriched signals into the health model.
connect: High completion rate provides clean signal quality for the Day-0 health score calibration.
body: Activation milestones feed back as enriched signals into the health model. High completion rate provides clean signal quality for the Day-0 health score calibration.
trace: Strong onboarding completion rate creates high-quality early lifecycle signals that improve health model accuracy from Day-0 forward.

title: Real-time telemetry enables immediate health score reaction to engagement changes
anchor: April 18 infrastructure upgrade eliminated the 72-hour signal delay.
connect: Health model can now detect and respond to usage patterns within minutes instead of days.
body: April 18 infrastructure upgrade eliminated the 72-hour signal delay. Health model can now detect and respond to usage patterns within minutes instead of days.
trace: Telemetry latency reduction from 72 hours to minutes fundamentally changes the health model's ability to surface engagement changes as they happen.

title: Completion attribution unlocks playbook outcome measurement for first time
anchor: CS platform update on April 18 exports completion events at the playbook level.
connect: 312 end-to-end completions in 30 days represents the first measured baseline for playbook effectiveness.
body: CS platform update on April 18 exports completion events at the playbook level. 312 end-to-end completions in 30 days represents the first measured baseline for playbook effectiveness.
trace: New platform capability transforms playbook governance from trigger-counting to actual outcome measurement.

title: Health model upgrade cycle accelerates with three consecutive quarters of AUC gains
anchor: 0.67 to 0.74 to 0.81 represents sustained model improvement over 6 months.
connect: Each iteration adds real signals and removes proxy measurements, improving renewal correlation.
body: 0.67 to 0.74 to 0.81 represents sustained model improvement over 6 months. Each iteration adds real signals and removes proxy measurements, improving renewal correlation.
trace: Systematic model improvement approach shows consistent results across three consecutive quarters of recalibration work.

title: Shadow production setup enables direct comparison between scoring approaches
anchor: Likelihood-to-renew model runs parallel to composite score starting April 21.
connect: Both models generate independent renewal predictions versus the same account base for A/B validation.
body: Likelihood-to-renew model runs parallel to composite score starting April 21. Both models generate independent renewal predictions versus the same account base for A/B validation.
trace: Parallel model architecture allows direct comparison of probabilistic versus composite scoring effectiveness without disrupting production workflows.

title: Coverage tier realignment moves 47 accounts based on 14-month behavioral data
anchor: Mid-touch to high-touch reclassification replaces onboarding-based tier assignments.
connect: New playbook routing begins Q3 with tiers matched to actual renewal and usage patterns.
body: Mid-touch to high-touch reclassification replaces onboarding-based tier assignments. New playbook routing begins Q3 with tiers matched to actual renewal and usage patterns.
trace: Segmentation refresh uses 14 months of actual account behavior to correct initial tier assignments made at onboarding.

title: Feature-usage pipeline approval sets stage for proxy signal elimination
anchor: BigQuery connection approved April 22 for Q2 implementation.
connect: Health model currently relies on login frequency as a proxy for actual feature engagement depth.
body: BigQuery connection approved April 22 for Q2 implementation. Health model currently relies on login frequency as a proxy for actual feature engagement depth.
trace: Data infrastructure investment moves the health model from proxy signals to direct feature-level engagement measurement.
